name: DOB NOW: Build — Job Application Filings (SODA)

authentication.recommended: Socrata application token via X-App-Token (HUMAN_ACTIONS §7; M1-T001 E7)

rate_limits.without_token: IP-throttled shared pool; throttle signal HTTP 429
rate_limits.with_token: not throttled unless abusive (dev.socrata.com/docs/app-tokens, M1-T001 E7)
rate_limits.pagination: SODA 2.1 (newBackend:true observed): $limit defaults to 1,000; no maximum on 2.1; stable paging requires $order (use :id). Evidence: dev.socrata.com/docs/queries/limit.html retrieved 2026-07-17

update_frequency: Daily (custom_fields Update Frequency 'Daily', Automation 'Yes'); observed rowsUpdatedAt 2026-07-16T20:23:19Z on 2026-07-17 — consistent
geographic_coverage: Citywide, per-filing records located by BIN/BBL/borough-block-lot/address. EXCLUDES electrical, elevator, and LAA jobs (own datasets) and all BIS-channel jobs (ic3t-wcy2, out of family).

fields_available.inventory_evidence: api/views columns array captured 2026-07-17 (fixtures/m1-t007/views_metadata_extract_16_datasets.json); official dictionary XLSX attachment identified (assetId 978bdfe8-11c3-4839-9515-7f36a83e219d, 74,405 bytes, extraction OQ-2)

key_join_fields_observed.job_filing_number: text, e.g. 'M00855935-I1' (borough letter + 8 digits + filing suffix)

fields_available.null_semantics: SODA omits null fields per record (79 of 95 keys present on sample rec 1); schema from columns array only

terms_usage_notes: NYC Open Data terms (no warranty; verified M1-T001 G1); dataset provenance flag 'official'; rights ['read'] public
connector_implementation: PLAN ONLY: per-BIN primary / per-BBL corroboration SODA queries; raw record + retrieval timestamp + rowsUpdatedAt persisted; columns-array drift check per run
latest_source_version: no per-record version field observed; version = retrieval timestamp + rowsUpdatedAt (2026-07-16T20:23:19Z at research time)
known_limitations: Excludes electrical/elevator/LAA jobs (official description, verbatim in findings §2.4) — union with those datasets AND the BIS family required for complete job history
Address strings display-grade (observed 'EAST   14 STREET' multi-space)
latitude/longitude typed text (not number) in this dataset
fallback_source: None equivalent for DOB NOW-channel jobs. Complementary (different channel, NOT fallback): BIS ic3t-wcy2. Mirror: catalog.data.gov/dataset/dob-now-build-job-application-filings (verified 2026-07-17).

name: DOB NOW: Build — Approved Permits (SODA)
geographic_coverage: Citywide. Official description (verbatim): all approved construction permits in DOB NOW EXCEPT Electrical (dm9a-ab7w), Elevator (kfp4-dz4h), and LAA (xxbr-ypig).

fields_available.inventory_evidence: api/views columns array 2026-07-17; dictionary XLSX attachment assetId 9a9d025e-5bd0-437c-92ea-41e78c9e8d4c (OQ-2)

key_join_fields_observed.job_filing_number: text — JOIN KEY TO w9ak-ipjd (same 'M00855935-I1' observed both sides)
key_join_fields_observed.work_permit: text, permit ID = job_filing_number + work-type suffix ('M00855935-I1-SG')
key_join_fields_observed.bbl: NUMBER-typed; observed serialization without decimal artifact ('4051980021'); normalize defensively (OQ-3)
key_join_fields_observed.borough: text, UPPER case observed ('MANHATTAN','QUEENS') — differs from w9ak-ipjd casing for the same property

fields_available.null_semantics: SODA omits nulls; 36 of 46 keys on sample rec 1

connector_implementation: PLAN ONLY: as w9ak-ipjd, plus MANDATORY job_filing_number/work_permit format validation ^[A-Z]\d{8}- (placeholder pollution observed) and permit_status-aware interpretation
latest_source_version: rowsUpdatedAt 2026-07-16T18:42:18Z at research time; no per-record version field
known_limitations: JOIN-KEY POLLUTION OBSERVED: sample record carries 'Permit is no' in job_filing_number and 'Permit is not yet issued' in work_permit while permit_status='Signed-off' (verbatim fixture sample_rbx6-tga4.json) — rows without issued permits exist in 'Approved Permits'
bbl/latitude/longitude/community_board/council_district/census_tract are number-typed (casting risk, OQ-3)
Borough casing differs from sibling datasets — normalize to borocode before matching
fallback_source: None for DOB NOW-channel permits. Complementary BIS channel: ipu4-2q9a ('most current permits are now issued in DOB NOW' per its own description).

name: DOB NOW: Certificate of Occupancy (SODA)
geographic_coverage: Citywide, COs issued through the DOB NOW CO module 'released in March of 2021' (official description); 79,236 rows on 2026-07-17

fields_available.inventory_evidence: api/views columns array 2026-07-17; dictionary XLSX assetId 90b77d47-f8e5-49a7-b020-ea3e23624c9c (OQ-2)

key_join_fields_observed.job_filing_name: text — observed 9-digit BIS-style value '120954770': DOB NOW CO module issues COs for BIS-originated jobs
key_join_fields_observed.c_of_o_issuance_date: TEXT, non-ISO format observed '02/15/22 11:08:46 AM' (2-digit year, AM/PM) — dedicated parser required

fields_available.null_semantics: SODA omits nulls; 24 of 24 keys on sample rec 1 (small schema)

terms_usage_notes: NYC Open Data terms; provenance 'official'; description instructs this dataset 'should be utilized instead of' bs8b-p36w from March 2021 onward
connector_implementation: PLAN ONLY: per-BIN/BBL queries; CO status/sequence/filing-type mapping; non-ISO issuance-date parser; dwelling-unit counts as property facts with provenance
known_limitations: Covers only COs issued since ~March 2021 — historical COs are in bs8b-p36w (legacy family, next task)
A CO record does not imply a DOB NOW job filing exists (BIS-style job_filing_name observed)
Description typo 'anbd' recorded (documentation quality)
fallback_source: Historical complement (not fallback): bs8b-p36w (COs 2012-07-12 to March 2021). PDF CO images referenced via BIS (www.nyc.gov/bis, 403-walled, OQ-1).

name: DOB NOW: Safety — Facades Compliance Filings (SODA)
update_frequency: Every weekday (stated — only family member not 'Daily'); observed rowsUpdatedAt 2026-07-16T17:31:05Z (a Thursday) — consistent
geographic_coverage: Citywide FISP/facade compliance filings submitted in DOB NOW; includes migrated pre-DOB NOW cycles (observed cycle-7 filing dated 2011-05-13; depth OQ-4); 86,683 rows

fields_available.inventory_evidence: api/views columns array 2026-07-17; dictionary XLSX (2025-12-12 revision) assetId 5248f214-2f4f-4352-aaa5-04623c8f38d8 (OQ-2)

key_join_fields_observed.bin: text ('1014176') — NO BBL FIELD EXISTS in this dataset

fields_available.null_semantics: SODA omits nulls; 34 of 40 keys on sample rec 1

connector_implementation: PLAN ONLY: per-BIN queries ONLY (no BBL); derive BBL via canonical BIN→BBL resolution with provenance note; facade status (SAFE/SWARMP/UNSAFE vocabulary — full domain from dictionary, OQ-2) as property flags
known_limitations: No BBL column — BIN-only property join
Pre-DOB NOW cycle coverage unquantified (OQ-4)
No latitude/longitude/geo columns
fallback_source: None identified on Open Data for facade compliance; DOB facades program pages are nyc.gov 403-walled (OQ-1)

name: DOB NOW: Safety Boiler (SODA)
geographic_coverage: Citywide annual boiler compliance filings; 871,266 rows on 2026-07-17

fields_available.inventory_evidence: api/views columns array 2026-07-17; dictionary XLSX (2017-09-08) assetId f2d45892-bb2b-48fa-9e61-11c4586a4db2 (OQ-2)

key_join_fields_observed.bin_number: NUMBER-typed, the ONLY location field ('1043866','1006014' observed; no BBL, no address, no borough)
key_join_fields_observed.tracking_number: text ('2018-10000021095Y0001-56770' = year + boiler_id + sequence, composition inferred from observation — verify via dictionary OQ-2)
key_join_fields_observed.inspection_date: TEXT, non-ISO 'MM/DD/YYYY 00:00:00' observed ('02/22/2018 00:00:00') — dedicated parser required

fields_available.null_semantics: SODA omits nulls; 14 of 21 keys on sample rec 1

connector_implementation: PLAN ONLY: per-BIN numeric queries ($where=bin_number=...); derive BBL via BIN resolution; boiler presence/compliance as property facts
known_limitations: BIN-only, number-typed; no BBL/address/borough columns at all
inspection_date non-ISO text format
Applicant/owner personal names present — provenance storage fine, but log redaction rules apply
fallback_source: None identified on Open Data for DOB NOW-era boiler compliance; legacy boiler data belongs to the BIS/legacy research task
